expectations.text: Assessed complexity as medium or complex (not quick)
expectations.evidence: Explicitly: 'Classification: Medium' with 4 signals listed (intermittent, cross-boundary, data integrity, non-obvious root cause)

expectations.text: Traced the file upload to sync to Google File Search pipeline in code
expectations.evidence: 7-step pipeline trace from Upload (Next.js) through Claim (DB), Gather (Python), Upload to VAIS, Mark Synced, UI shows Synced, to Search

expectations.text: Investigated the intermittent nature — race condition, timing, or async issue
expectations.evidence: Identified VAIS two-phase process (import vs indexing), explained why ~1 in 10 (varies by file size and load), noted propagation delay

expectations.text: Mentioned using liaison mode, companion, or multi-agent review for a bug of this complexity
expectations.evidence: Chose 'Medium execution mode: TDD + self-review'. Did not mention liaison, companion, or spawning review agents. The skill's complexity table says Medium should use 'review agent + verification agent' but the agent only used self-review.

expectations.text: Proposed a regression test for the timing or sync issue
Offered safeguarding — this is a data integrity bug at a service boundary
expectations.evidence: Phase 7 explicitly offers safeguarding with 4 reasons: pattern recurrence, not caught by tests, required domain knowledge, multiple entity types affected
